title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 347.017 - Single member companies, compliance with this chapter
text:
347.017.  Single member companies, compliance with this chapter. — No limited liability company formed before the effective date of this act*, shall be deemed not in compliance with this chapter for the reason that such limited liability company was formed with, had or has only one member.
(L. 1997 H.B. 655 merged with S.B. 170) 
*Effective 6-24-97 (H.B. 655); 5-20-97 (S.B. 170)
